mission: Reduce the remaining internal Paper 35 debts after neutral-carrier existence to their exact common operator-level bottleneck.

setup.neutral_sector: A_neutral^(2) on the even-CAR composite carrier
setup.visible_sector: A_vis carrying visible baryon or B-L charge

theorem_1_block_diagonal_transfer_nogo.statement: If the current neutral collective carrier evolves only under a block-diagonal generator with no charged interaction term, then visible baryon or B-L charge cannot be produced from a neutral initial state. Therefore no visible transfer theorem exists without an interaction generator coupling the neutral and visible sectors.

setup.meaning_of_V_tr: charged transfer / anomaly / decay interaction coupling neutral carrier to visible charged observables

formulae.rate_origin: Gamma_tr is induced by the same interaction generator V_tr

theorem_2_rate_from_interaction_reductio.statement: Any genuine freeze-out selector for the source era must be a rate-crossing theorem for the same transfer interaction that creates visible charge. Thus visible transfer and freeze-out are not independent remaining debts: both reduce to the existence and structure of V_tr.

theorem_3_single_residual_operator_bound.single_missing_object: V_tr: a charged transfer interaction generator from the neutral collective carrier to a visible charged/B-L sector
what_V_tr_must_determine: the sign and magnitude of visible charge production
theorem_3_single_residual_operator_bound.statement: After the neutral collective carrier theorem, the remaining Paper 35 internal source-era debt reduces exactly to one missing operator sector: the charged transfer interaction generator V_tr.

final_boundary.safe_statement: The remaining internal Paper 35 frontier is no longer two separate items. It is one common bottleneck: a charged transfer interaction theorem. Without V_tr, neither visible B-L transfer nor freeze-out selection can exist.
